Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPPRC1 ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform Practitioner READ;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; DIQ 10090 ; DVPXUTL ; RDPRC(SOURCE,TARGET) ; N ARRAY,DVPLOC N X F X="practitionerId" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) ; I $G(PRACTITI)="" D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","required","MSG_RESOURCE_ID_MISSING","Practitioner Identifier is required.","RDPRC^DVPPRC1") ; I '$$SITECHK^DVPXUTL(PRACTITI,"RDPRC^DVPPRC") G QUIT I +$P(PRACTITI,":",5)=0 D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","code-invalid","MSG_ID_INVALID","The supplied practitionerId: "_PRACTITI_" has an invalid format.","RDPRC^DVPPRC1") ; I $P($G(PRACTITI),":",5)="" D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","required","MSG_RESOURCE_ID_MISSING","Practitioner Identifier: "_PRACTITI_" does not have the correct format.","RDPRC^DVPPRC1") ; S IEN=$P($G(PRACTITI),":",5) D GETS^DIQ(200,IEN_",",".01","","ARRAY") I $D(ARRAY)'=10 D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","not-found","MSG_NO_EXIST","No Location record found for practitionerId: "_PRACTITI_".","RDPRC^DVPPRC1") ; D FHIRPRC(PRACTITI,.DVPLOC,0) M @TARGET@("results","resource")=DVPLOC QUIT ; Q ; FHIRPRC(PRACTITI,TARGET,SMRY) ; N FMIEN,CNT,IX,X S FMIEN=$P(PRACTITI,":",5)_"," N FLDS S FLDS=".1215;.1216;.1217;.1218;4;10.6;200.07;.01;.132;.135;.133;.134;.131;.136;.137;.138;" S FLDS=FLDS_".151;.111;.112;.113;.114;.115;.116;.1211;.1212;.1213;.1214" N ARRAY D GETS^DIQ(200,FMIEN_",",FLDS,"","ARRAY") N IARRAY D GETS^DIQ(200,FMIEN_",","10.1;5","I","IARRAY") ; identifier S TARGET("id")=PRACTITI S TARGET("identifier",1,"use")="usual" S TARGET("identifier",1,"system")="http://lighthouse.va.org/identifiers/vista/ien" S TARGET("identifier",1,"value")=PRACTITI N NPI D GETS^DIQ(200,FMIEN_",","42*","I","NPI") ;sort by date first (just in case) N NPISRTD,NPIPRD,IX S IX="" F S IX=$O(NPI(200.042,IX)) Q:IX="" D . S NPISRTD(NPI("200.042",IX,".01","I"),2)=NPI("200.042",IX,".02","I") . S NPISRTD(NPI("200.042",IX,".01","I"),3)=NPI("200.042",IX,".03","I") ;create periods N PRVIX S PRVIX=0,IX="" F S IX=$O(NPISRTD(IX)) Q:IX="" D . I +PRVIX=0 S PRVIX=IX . I NPISRTD(IX,2)=0!(NPISRTD(IX,2)="") S NPIPRD(IX,"START")=IX,PRVIX=IX . I NPISRTD(IX,2)=1 S NPIPRD(PRVIX,"END")=IX,NPIPRD(PRVIX,"NPI")=NPISRTD(IX,3) ; dump on global and clean up S CNT="",IX=1 F S CNT=$O(NPIPRD(CNT)) Q:CNT="" D . S X="^^http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/us-npi^"_NPIPRD(CNT,"NPI")_"^"_$G(NPIPRD(CNT,"START"))_"^"_$G(NPIPRD(CNT,"END"))_"^" . S IX=IX+1 . N ID D IDENT^DVPXUTL(.ID,X) . M TARGET("identifier",IX)=ID K NPI,NPISRTD,NPIPRD ; active N ACTIVE S ACTIVE=$P($$ACTIVE^XUSER($P(PRACTITI,":",5)),U) S TARGET("active")=$S(ACTIVE=1:"true",1:"false") ; name S TARGET("name","text")=ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.01) S TARGET("name","use")="official" S NAMEIEN=IARRAY(200,FMIEN,10.1,"I") N NAMES D GETS^DIQ(20,NAMEIEN_",","**","","NAMES") S TARGET("name","family")=NAMES(20,NAMEIEN_",",1) S TARGET("name","given")=NAMES(20,NAMEIEN_",",2) I NAMES(20,NAMEIEN_",",3)'="" S TARGET("name","given")=TARGET("name","given")_" "_NAMES(20,NAMEIEN_",",3) I NAMES(20,NAMEIEN_",",4)'="" S TARGET("name","prefix")=NAMES(20,NAMEIEN_",",4) I NAMES(20,NAMEIEN_",",5)'="" S TARGET("name","suffix")=NAMES(20,NAMEIEN_",",5) ; telecom N TELECOM,RANK S RANK=0 I ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.132)'="" D . S RANK=RANK+1 . D TELECOM^DVPXUTL(.TELECOM,"phone^"_$$FORMAT^DVPXUTL(ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.132))_"^work^"_RANK_"^^") . M TARGET("telecom",2)=TELECOM I ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.135)'="" D . S RANK=RANK+1 K TELECOM . D TELECOM^DVPXUTL(.TELECOM,"phone^"_$$FORMAT^DVPXUTL(ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.135))_"^work^"_RANK_"^^") . M TARGET("telecom",5)=TELECOM I ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.133)'="" D . S RANK=RANK+1 K TELECOM . D TELECOM^DVPXUTL(.TELECOM,"phone^"_$$FORMAT^DVPXUTL(ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.133))_"^temp^"_RANK_"^^") . M TARGET("telecom",3)=TELECOM I ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.134)'="" D . S RANK=RANK+1 K TELECOM . D TELECOM^DVPXUTL(.TELECOM,"phone^"_$$FORMAT^DVPXUTL(ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.134))_"^temp^"_RANK_"^^") . M TARGET("telecom",4)=TELECOM I ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.131)'="" D . S RANK=RANK+1 K TELECOM . D TELECOM^DVPXUTL(.TELECOM,"phone^"_$$FORMAT^DVPXUTL(ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.131))_"^home^"_""_"^^") . M TARGET("telecom",1)=TELECOM I ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.136)'="" D . S RANK=RANK+1 K TELECOM . D TELECOM^DVPXUTL(.TELECOM,"fax^"_$$FORMAT^DVPXUTL(ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.136))_"^work^"_""_"^^") . M TARGET("telecom",6)=TELECOM I ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.137)'="" D . S RANK=RANK+1 K TELECOM . D TELECOM^DVPXUTL(.TELECOM,"pager^"_$$FORMAT^DVPXUTL(ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.137))_"^work^"_""_"^^") . M TARGET("telecom",7)=TELECOM I ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.138)'="" D . S RANK=RANK+1 K TELECOM . D TELECOM^DVPXUTL(.TELECOM,"pager^"_$$FORMAT^DVPXUTL(ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.138))_"^work^"_""_"^^") . M TARGET("telecom",8)=TELECOM I ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.151)'="" D . S RANK=RANK+1 K TELECOM . D TELECOM^DVPXUTL(.TELECOM,"email^"_ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.151)_"^work^"_""_"^^") . M TARGET("telecom",9)=TELECOM ; address N ADDR,X S X="home^physical^"_ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.111)_"^"_ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.112)_"^"_ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.113)_"^"_ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.114) S X=X_"^^"_ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.115)_"^"_ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.116)_"^^^" D ADDRESS^DVPXUTL(.ADDR,X) I $D(ADDR) M TARGET("address")=ADDR K ADDR,X S X="temp^physical^"_ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.1211)_"^"_ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.1212)_"^"_ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.1213)_"^"_ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.1214) S X=X_"^^"_ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.1215)_"^"_ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.1216)_"^^"_ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.1217)_"^"_ARRAY(200,FMIEN,.1218) D ADDRESS^DVPXUTL(.ADDR,X) I $D(ADDR) M TARGET("address")=ADDR ; gender I ARRAY(200,FMIEN,4)'="" S TARGET("gender")=$$LOW^XLFSTR(ARRAY(200,FMIEN,4)) ; birthdate I IARRAY(200,FMIEN,5,"I")'="" S TARGET("birthdate")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL(IARRAY(200,FMIEN,5,"I")) ; qualification I ARRAY(200,FMIEN,10.6)'="" D . S TARGET("qualification","code","text")=ARRAY(200,FMIEN,10.6) . S TARGET("qualification","identifier","use")="usual" ; communication I ARRAY(200,FMIEN,200.07)'="" S TARGET("communication","code","text")=ARRAY(200,FMIEN,200.07) Q
